name: Jewel Legends: Tree of Life
short_description: The Hods, magical beings and pure of heart, once lived in harmony with the holy Tree of Life. But the endless greed of a dark demon forced the Hods into hiding. Now, new hope springs eternal. In this Match-3 game you have too restore the Tree of Life and rebuild the world of the Hods!
detailed_description:
Play this great Match-3 adventure ! The Hods, magical beings and pure of heart, once lived in harmony with the holy Tree of Life. But the endless greed of a dark demon forced the Hods into hiding. Now, new hope springs eternal. Rebuild the world of the Hods and restore the Tree of Life to its old strength!

Collect resources and build marvelous structures such as Bath House Blubberpot, the Mushroom Farm and the Fountain of Wonder.

Features:

• 3 game modes: Adventure, Tournament, Freeplay

• Challenging Mini Games

• Build a huge village for the Hods

• Many bonus tools and Power Ups

• 100 exciting levels

• Earn Achievements

• Unique soundtrack

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
